subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of God! I have not forgotten you and will not forget you. The ear of mind is constantly waiting...Exert every effort to acquire the various branches of knowledge and true understanding. Strain every nerve to achieve both material and spiritual accomplishments
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی شما را فراموش ننموده و نخواهم نمود دائما گوش هوش منتظر استماع
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @being a source of light; guidance, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @call to acquire knowledge; sciences
